Event: Mushroom Loot - October 2025
Event Date: 29/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR335
Pumpkin Lord Plate Mail

For the duration of the battle, the unit that receives healing spreads 35% of the healing received to all allied units.

The unit's incoming and outgoing healing is increased by 60% for the duration of the battle.

Requirements: 98-100
